pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB Builder
pyqgis_plugin.description: Full RORB rainfall-runoff routing model from shapefiles with batch design storm analysis and results viewer
pyqgis_plugin.about: v2.10: Export tab redesign — folder picker, Export Hydrographs and Export Hyetographs buttons (one CSV per AEP, critical duration rep TP); parses catchment-mean rainfall from .out file. v2.9: Critical Events tab in Results Viewer — summary table (AEP, critical duration, rep TP, mean/rep peak, time to peak) with click-to-plot rep TP hydrograph and mean peak line, plus Export Critical CSV. v2.8: RORB Results Viewer — reads folder of RORBWin .out files, plots all TPs with toggles, exports critical hydros. v2.7: Export all hydrographs to folder. v2.6: Exact ARR 2016 ARF formula. v2.5: Auto-compute ARF. v2.4: TP numbers match RORB convention. v2.1: Batch design storms with ARR 2016 critical duration and rep TP.
